content.full_text:
May 1, 2003

D. Scott Isaacson
Los Angeles Unified School District
Office of the General Counsel
Ethics Office
333 So. Beaudry Avenue, 24th Floor
Los Angeles, CA 90017

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-084

Dear Mr. Isaacson:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of April 28, 2003, you indicated that your facsimile transmission dated April 24, 2003, was not a request for written advice. Accordingly, we have withdrawn your letter from our advice process.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at (866) 275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Kevin Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division

KM:jg
